input:
Score this tool description:

**check_rate_limits**: Before making external API calls, check remaining rate-limit budget. Returns a single JSON object with `remaining_calls` (int), `reset_at` (ISO 8601), and `should_throttle` (bool). ~120 tokens. Call before any batch of 5+ API requests.
description: Before making external API calls, check remaining rate-limit budget. Returns a single JSON object with `remaining_calls` (int), `reset_at` (ISO 8601), and `should_throttle` (bool). ~120 tokens. Call before any batch of 5+ API requests.
rationale: Output shape (single JSON with 3 named fields), cost signal (~120 tokens), trigger (before batch of 5+ API calls), specificity (rate-limit budget), differentiation (only tool that checks rate limits).
